title: Grosourdya fasciculata
taxonomy: Grosourdya fasciculata is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Aeridinae and the tribe Vandeae. Within the tribe Vandeae, it is classified under the subtribe Aeridinae. Grosourdya fasciculata is further classified into the genus Grosourdya. The species is native to tropical Asia.

intro: Grosourdya fasciculata, also known as the Grosourdya orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Grosourdya fasciculata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
